title: DySCo: Dynamic Semantic Compression for Effective Long-term Time Series Forecasting
summary: Time series forecasting (TSF) is critical across domains such as finance, meteorology, and energy. While extending the lookback window theoretically provides richer historical context, in practice, it often introduces irrelevant noise and computational redundancy, preventing models from effectively capturing complex long-term dependencies. To address these challenges, we propose a Dynamic Semantic Compression (DySCo) framework. Unlike traditional methods that rely on fixed heuristics, DySCo introduces an Entropy-Guided Dynamic Sampling (EGDS) mechanism to autonomously identify and retain high-entropy segments while compressing redundant trends. Furthermore, we incorporate a Hierarchical Frequency-Enhanced Decomposition (HFED) strategy to separate high-frequency anomalies from low-frequency patterns, ensuring that critical details are preserved during sparse sampling. Finally, a Cross-Scale Interaction Mixer(CSIM) is designed to dynamically fuse global contexts with local representations, replacing simple linear aggregation. Experimental results demonstrate that DySCo serves as a universal plug-and-play module, significantly enhancing the ability of mainstream models to capture long-term correlations with reduced computational cost.

AI.tldr: DySCo框架通过动态语义压缩解决长时间序列预测中的噪声和计算冗余问题，使用熵引导采样、层次频率分解和跨尺度交互混合器来提升主流模型的长期相关性捕捉能力。
AI.motivation: 长时间序列预测中，延长回看窗口理论上能提供更丰富的历史上下文，但实际上会引入无关噪声和计算冗余，阻碍模型有效捕捉复杂的长期依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出动态语义压缩(DySCo)框架：1) 熵引导动态采样(EGDS)机制自主识别并保留高熵片段，压缩冗余趋势；2) 层次频率增强分解(HFED)策略分离高频异常和低频模式；3) 跨尺度交互混合器(CSIM)动态融合全局上下文与局部表示。
AI.result: 实验结果表明DySCo作为通用即插即用模块，显著增强了主流模型捕捉长期相关性的能力，同时降低了计算成本。
AI.conclusion: DySCo框架有效解决了长时间序列预测中的噪声和冗余问题，通过动态语义压缩机制提升了模型的长期依赖捕捉能力，具有通用性和实用性。

title: No Attacker Needed: Unintentional Cross-User Contamination in Shared-State LLM Agents
summary: LLM-based agents increasingly operate across repeated sessions, maintaining task states to ensure continuity. In many deployments, a single agent serves multiple users within a team or organization, reusing a shared knowledge layer across user identities. This shared persistence expands the failure surface: information that is locally valid for one user can silently degrade another user's outcome when the agent reapplies it without regard for scope. We refer to this failure mode as unintentional cross-user contamination (UCC). Unlike adversarial memory poisoning, UCC requires no attacker; it arises from benign interactions whose scope-bound artifacts persist and are later misapplied. We formalize UCC through a controlled evaluation protocol, introduce a taxonomy of three contamination types, and evaluate the problem in two shared-state mechanisms. Under raw shared state, benign interactions alone produce contamination rates of 57--71%. A write-time sanitization is effective when shared state is conversational, but leaves substantial residual risk when shared state includes executable artifacts, with contamination often manifesting as silent wrong answers. These results indicate that shared-state agents need artifact-level defenses beyond text-level sanitization to prevent silent cross-user failures.

AI.tldr: LLM智能体在多用户共享知识层时，会出现无意识的跨用户污染问题，导致一个用户的有效信息被错误地应用于其他用户，造成静默错误。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM智能体在重复会话中运行并维护任务状态，单个智能体服务于团队或组织内的多个用户，共享知识层。这种共享持久性扩大了故障面：对某个用户本地有效的信息，当智能体不考虑范围而重新应用时，会静默地降低其他用户的结果质量。
AI.method: 通过受控评估协议形式化UCC问题，引入三种污染类型的分类法，并在两种共享状态机制中评估该问题。评估了原始共享状态和写入时净化两种机制的效果。
AI.result: 在原始共享状态下，仅良性交互就会产生57-71%的污染率。写入时净化在共享状态为对话式时有效，但当共享状态包含可执行工件时，仍存在大量残余风险，污染通常表现为静默错误答案。
AI.conclusion: 共享状态智能体需要超越文本级净化的工件级防御措施，以防止静默的跨用户故障。仅靠对话层面的净化不足以应对包含可执行工件的复杂场景。

title: Forecasting Supply Chain Disruptions with Foresight Learning
summary:
Anticipating supply chain disruptions before they materialize is a core challenge for firms and policymakers alike. A key difficulty is learning to reason reliably about infrequent, high-impact events from noisy and unstructured inputs - a setting where general-purpose models struggle without task-specific adaptation. We introduce an end-to-end framework that trains LLMs to produce calibrated probabilistic forecasts using realized disruption outcomes as supervision. The resulting model substantially outperforms strong baselines - including GPT-5 - on accuracy, calibration, and precision. We also show that training induces more structured and reliable probabilistic reasoning without explicit prompting. These results suggest a general pathway for training domain-specific forecasting models that produce decision-ready signals. To support transparency we open-source the evaluation dataset used in this study.
  Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/LightningRodLabs/supply-chain-predictions

AI.tldr: 提出端到端框架训练LLM进行供应链中断概率预测，显著优于GPT-5等基线模型
AI.motivation: 供应链中断预测面临低频高影响事件、噪声和非结构化数据的挑战，通用模型需要任务特定适应
AI.method: 引入端到端框架，使用实际中断结果作为监督训练LLM产生校准的概率预测
AI.result: 模型在准确性、校准性和精确度上大幅优于GPT-5等强基线，训练诱导出更结构化可靠的概率推理
AI.conclusion: 为训练领域特定预测模型提供通用路径，产生决策就绪信号，开源评估数据集支持透明度

title: ViTs for Action Classification in Videos: An Approach to Risky Tackle Detection in American Football Practice Videos
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures. Accepted to ICPR 2026 (28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition)
summary: Early identification of hazardous actions in contact sports enables timely intervention and improves player safety. We present a method for detecting risky tackles in American football practice videos and introduce a substantially expanded dataset for this task. Our work contains 733 single-athlete-dummy tackle clips, each temporally localized around first point contact and labeled with a strike zone component of the standardized Assessment for Tackling Technique (SATT-3), extending prior work that reported 178 annotated videos. Using a Vision transformer-based model with imbalance-aware training, we obtain risky recall of 0.67 and Risky F1 of 0.59 under crossvalidation. Relative to the previous baseline in a smaller subset (risky recall of 0.58; Risky F1 0.56 ), our approach improves risky recall by more than 8% points on a much larger dataset. These results indicate that the vision transformer-based video analysis, coupled with careful handling of class imbalance, can reliably detect rare but safety-critical tackling patterns, offering a practical pathway toward coach-centered injury prevention tools.

AI.tldr: 基于视觉Transformer的视频分析方法，通过处理类别不平衡问题，在美式足球训练视频中检测危险擒抱动作，在更大数据集上比先前基线提升了8%以上的危险召回率。
AI.motivation: 在接触性运动中及早识别危险动作能够及时干预并提高运动员安全。美式足球中的危险擒抱动作检测对于预防伤害至关重要，但现有数据集较小且检测方法有待改进。
AI.method: 使用视觉Transformer模型，结合处理类别不平衡的训练策略，在扩展的数据集（733个单运动员-假人擒抱片段）上进行危险擒抱检测，每个片段都标注了标准擒抱技术评估的撞击区域组件。
AI.result: 在交叉验证中获得0.67的危险召回率和0.59的危险F1分数。相比先前在较小数据集上的基线（危险召回率0.58，危险F1 0.56），危险召回率提升了超过8个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 视觉Transformer视频分析结合类别不平衡处理能够可靠检测罕见但安全关键的擒抱模式，为教练中心的伤害预防工具提供了实用途径。

title: GRAZE: Grounded Refinement and Motion-Aware Zero-Shot Event Localization
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, accepted to the CVPR 2026 Workshop on Computer Vision in Sports (CVSports) code: https://github.com/AhsanZaidi12/GRAZE
summary: American football practice generates video at scale, yet the interaction of interest occupies only a brief window of each long, untrimmed clip. Reliable biomechanical analysis, therefore, depends on spatiotemporal localization that identifies both the interacting entities and the onset of contact. We study First Point of Contact (FPOC), defined as the first frame in which a player physically touches a tackle dummy, in unconstrained practice footage with camera motion, clutter, multiple similarly equipped athletes, and rapid pose changes around impact. We present GRAZE, a training-free pipeline for FPOC localization that requires no labeled tackle-contact examples. GRAZE uses Grounding DINO to discover candidate player-dummy interactions, refines them with motion-aware temporal reasoning, and uses SAM2 as an explicit pixel-level verifier of contact rather than relying on detection confidence alone. This separation between candidate discovery and contact confirmation makes the approach robust to cluttered scenes and unstable grounding near impact. On 738 tackle-practice videos, GRAZE produces valid outputs for 97.4% of clips and localizes FPOC within $\pm$ 10 frames on 77.5% of all clips and within $\pm$ 20 frames on 82.7% of all clips. These results show that frame-accurate contact onset localization in real-world practice footage is feasible without task-specific training.

AI.tldr: GRAZE：无需训练、无需标注的橄榄球训练视频中首次接触点（FPOC）定位方法，通过目标检测、运动感知时序推理和像素级接触验证实现
AI.motivation: 橄榄球训练视频量大但关键交互时间短暂，需要可靠的时空定位来识别交互实体和接触起始点，用于生物力学分析。现有方法面临相机运动、杂乱场景、多运动员和快速姿态变化等挑战。
AI.method: GRAZE训练免费流水线：1) 使用Grounding DINO发现候选球员-假人交互；2) 运动感知时序推理进行精炼；3) 使用SAM2作为像素级接触验证器，不依赖检测置信度。候选发现与接触确认分离提高鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在738个擒抱训练视频上，GRAZE在97.4%的片段中产生有效输出，77.5%的片段中FPOC定位误差在±10帧内，82.7%的片段中误差在±20帧内。
AI.conclusion: 无需任务特定训练即可在真实训练视频中实现帧级准确的接触起始定位是可行的，GRAZE为生物力学分析提供了实用解决方案。

title: Massively Parallel Exact Inference for Hawkes Processes
summary: Multivariate Hawkes processes are a widely used class of self-exciting point processes, but maximum likelihood estimation naively scales as $O(N^2)$ in the number of events. The canonical linear exponential Hawkes process admits a faster $O(N)$ recurrence, but prior work evaluates this recurrence sequentially, without exploiting parallelization on modern GPUs. We show that the Hawkes process intensity can be expressed as a product of sparse transition matrices admitting a linear-time associative multiply, enabling computation via a parallel prefix scan. This yields a simple yet massively parallelizable algorithm for maximum likelihood estimation of linear exponential Hawkes processes. Our method reduces the computational complexity to approximately $O(N/P)$ with $P$ parallel processors, and naturally yields a batching scheme to maintain constant memory usage, avoiding GPU memory constraints. Importantly, it computes the exact likelihood without any additional assumptions or approximations, preserving the simplicity and interpretability of the model. We demonstrate orders-of-magnitude speedups on simulated and real datasets, scaling to thousands of nodes and tens of millions of events, substantially beyond scales reported in prior work. We provide an open-source PyTorch library implementing our optimizations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于并行前缀扫描的线性指数Hawkes过程最大似然估计算法，将计算复杂度从O(N²)降低到约O(N/P)，实现大规模并行化
AI.motivation: 传统多元Hawkes过程的最大似然估计计算复杂度为O(N²)，线性指数Hawkes过程虽有O(N)递推但无法利用现代GPU并行化，需要开发能充分利用并行计算的高效算法
AI.method: 将Hawkes过程强度表示为稀疏转移矩阵的乘积，通过线性时间关联乘法实现并行前缀扫描计算，开发了简单且大规模并行化的最大似然估计算法
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上实现了数量级的速度提升，可扩展到数千个节点和数千万个事件，远超先前工作的规模，并提供了开源的PyTorch库实现
AI.conclusion: 提出的并行前缀扫描算法为线性指数Hawkes过程提供了精确、高效且可扩展的最大似然估计方法，在保持模型简单性和可解释性的同时显著提升了计算性能

title: Malliavin Calculus for Counterfactual Gradient Estimation in Adaptive Inverse Reinforcement Learning
summary: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) recovers the loss function of a forward learner from its observed responses adaptive IRL aims to reconstruct the loss function of a forward learner by passively observing its gradients as it performs reinforcement learning (RL). This paper proposes a novel passive Langevin-based algorithm that achieves adaptive IRL. The key difficulty in adaptive IRL is that the required gradients in the passive algorithm are counterfactual, that is, they are conditioned on events of probability zero under the forward learner's trajectory. Therefore, naive Monte Carlo estimators are prohibitively inefficient, and kernel smoothing, though common, suffers from slow convergence. We overcome this by employing Malliavin calculus to efficiently estimate the required counterfactual gradients. We reformulate the counterfactual conditioning as a ratio of unconditioned expectations involving Malliavin quantities, thus recovering standard estimation rates. We derive the necessary Malliavin derivatives and their adjoint Skorohod integral formulations for a general Langevin structure, and provide a concrete algorithmic approach which exploits these for counterfactual gradient estimation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Malliavin微积分的被动Langevin算法，用于自适应逆强化学习，有效估计反事实梯度
AI.motivation: 自适应逆强化学习需要从观察到的梯度中重建前向学习者的损失函数，但所需的反事实梯度条件概率为零，传统蒙特卡洛估计效率低下，核平滑收敛慢
AI.method: 使用Malliavin微积分将反事实条件化为无条件期望的比值，推导Langevin结构的Malliavin导数及其伴随Skorohod积分公式，提供具体算法实现反事实梯度估计
AI.result: 通过Malliavin方法克服了反事实梯度估计的困难，恢复了标准估计速率，比传统方法更高效
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于Malliavin微积分的被动Langevin算法为自适应逆强化学习提供了有效的反事实梯度估计方法，解决了传统方法的效率问题

title: Reinforcing Consistency in Video MLLMs with Structured Rewards
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in video understanding. However, seemingly plausible outputs often suffer from poor visual and temporal grounding: a model may fabricate object existence, assign incorrect attributes, or collapse repeated events while still producing a globally reasonable caption or answer. We study this failure mode through a compositional consistency audit that decomposes a caption into supporting factual and temporal claims, investigating whether a correct high-level prediction is actually backed by valid lower-level evidence. Our top-down audit reveals that even correct root relational claims often lack reliable attribute and existence support. This indicates that standard sentence-level supervision is a weak proxy for faithful video understanding. Furthermore, when turning to reinforcement learning (RL) for better alignment, standard sentence-level rewards often prove too coarse to accurately localize specific grounding failures. To address this, we replace generic sentence-level rewards with a structured reward built from factual and temporal units. Our training objective integrates three complementary components: (1) an instance-aware scene-graph reward for factual objects, attributes, and relations; (2) a temporal reward for event ordering and repetition; and (3) a video-grounded VQA reward for hierarchical self-verification. Across temporal, general video understanding, and hallucination-oriented benchmarks, this objective yields consistent gains on open-source backbones. These results suggest that structured reward shaping is a practical route to more faithful video understanding.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结构化奖励机制来改善多模态大语言模型在视频理解中的视觉和时间基础问题，通过分解事实和时间单元来增强模型的忠实性。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在视频理解中虽然取得了显著进展，但经常存在视觉和时间基础不准确的问题，如虚构对象存在、分配错误属性或压缩重复事件等。标准句子级监督无法有效检测这些基础错误，而强化学习中通用的句子级奖励也难以准确定位具体的接地失败。
AI.method: 提出了一种结构化奖励机制，包含三个互补组件：(1) 实例感知的场景图奖励，用于事实对象、属性和关系；(2) 时间奖励，用于事件排序和重复；(3) 视频接地的视觉问答奖励，用于分层自验证。通过组合一致性审计分解字幕为事实和时间声明，验证高层预测是否得到有效底层证据支持。
AI.result: 在时间基准、通用视频理解和幻觉导向基准测试中，该结构化奖励方法在开源骨干模型上取得了一致的性能提升，表明结构化奖励塑造是实现更忠实视频理解的有效途径。
AI.conclusion: 结构化奖励机制能够有效改善多模态大语言模型在视频理解中的视觉和时间基础问题，通过细粒度的奖励组件提供更精确的监督信号，是实现更忠实视频理解的实用途径。

title: 3-D Relative Localization for Multi-Robot Systems with Angle and Self-Displacement Measurements
summary: Realizing relative localization by leveraging inter-robot local measurements is a challenging problem, especially in the presence of measurement noise. Motivated by this challenge, in this paper we propose a novel and systematic 3-D relative localization framework based on inter-robot interior angle and self-displacement measurements. Initially, we propose a linear relative localization theory comprising a distributed linear relative localization algorithm and sufficient conditions for localizability. According to this theory, robots can determine their neighbors' relative positions and orientations in a purely linear manner. Subsequently, in order to deal with measurement noise, we present an advanced Maximum a Posterior (MAP) estimator by addressing three primary challenges existing in the MAP estimator. Firstly, it is common to formulate the MAP problem as an optimization problem, whose inherent non-convexity can result in local optima. To address this issue, we reformulate the linear computation process of the linear relative localization algorithm as a Weighted Total Least Squares (WTLS) optimization problem on manifolds. The optimal solution of the WTLS problem is more accurate, which can then be used as initial values when solving the optimization problem associated with the MAP problem, thereby reducing the risk of falling into local optima. The second challenge is the lack of knowledge of the prior probability density of the robots' relative positions and orientations at the initial time, which is required as an input for the MAP estimator. To deal with it, we combine the WTLS with a Neural Density Estimator (NDE). Thirdly, to prevent the increasing size of the relative positions and orientations to be estimated as the robots continuously move when solving the MAP problem, a marginalization mechanism is designed, which ensures that the computational cost remains constant.

AI.tldr: 提出基于机器人间内角与自位移测量的3D相对定位框架，包含线性定位理论与抗噪MAP估计器
AI.motivation: 在测量噪声存在的情况下，利用机器人间局部测量实现相对定位是一个具有挑战性的问题
AI.method: 1) 提出分布式线性相对定位算法与可定位性充分条件；2) 将MAP问题重构为流形上的加权总体最小二乘优化；3) 结合神经密度估计器处理先验概率未知问题；4) 设计边缘化机制控制计算成本
AI.result: 开发了系统性的3D相对定位框架，能够以纯线性方式确定邻居的相对位置和方向，并通过改进的MAP估计器有效处理测量噪声
AI.conclusion: 该框架为噪声环境下的机器人相对定位提供了系统解决方案，通过线性理论、WTLS优化、NDE结合和边缘化机制解决了MAP估计中的三个主要挑战

title: Posterior Optimization with Clipped Objective for Bridging Efficiency and Stability in Generative Policy Learning
summary: Expressive generative models have advanced robotic manipulation by capturing complex, multi-modal action distributions over temporally extended trajectories. However, fine-tuning these policies via RL remains challenging due to instability and sample inefficiency. We introduce Posterior Optimization with Clipped Objective (POCO), a principled RL framework that formulates policy improvement as a posterior inference problem tailored for temporal action chunks. Through an Expectation-Maximization procedure, POCO distills a reward-weighted implicit posterior into the policy without likelihood estimation. Furthermore, POCO adopts an offline-to-online paradigm that anchors online exploration to pre-trained priors, and its model-agnostic design scales to fine-tune large VLA models without architectural modifications. Evaluations across 7 simulation benchmarks and 4 contact-rich real-world tasks demonstrate that POCO prevents catastrophic policy collapse, outperforms SOTA baselines, and achieves a 96.7% success rate on real-world tasks. Videos are available at our project website https://cccedric.github.io/poco/.

AI.tldr: POCO是一个用于机器人操作的强化学习框架，通过后验优化和裁剪目标来微调生成模型策略，防止灾难性策略崩溃并提高样本效率。
AI.motivation: 虽然表达性生成模型能够捕捉复杂多模态的动作分布，但通过强化学习微调这些策略仍然面临不稳定和样本效率低的问题。
AI.method: POCO将策略改进形式化为时间动作块的后验推断问题，通过期望最大化过程将奖励加权的隐式后验蒸馏到策略中，无需似然估计。采用离线到在线范式，将在线探索锚定到预训练先验，模型无关设计可扩展微调大型VLA模型。
AI.result: 在7个模拟基准和4个接触丰富的真实世界任务中，POCO防止了灾难性策略崩溃，超越了最先进的基线方法，在真实世界任务中实现了96.7%的成功率。
AI.conclusion: POCO提供了一个原则性的强化学习框架，能够有效微调表达性生成模型策略，在模拟和真实世界任务中都表现出优越性能。

title: DynaVid: Learning to Generate Highly Dynamic Videos using Synthetic Motion Data
summary: Despite recent progress, video diffusion models still struggle to synthesize realistic videos involving highly dynamic motions or requiring fine-grained motion controllability. A central limitation lies in the scarcity of such examples in commonly used training datasets. To address this, we introduce DynaVid, a video synthesis framework that leverages synthetic motion data in training, which is represented as optical flow and rendered using computer graphics pipelines. This approach offers two key advantages. First, synthetic motion offers diverse motion patterns and precise control signals that are difficult to obtain from real data. Second, unlike rendered videos with artificial appearances, rendered optical flow encodes only motion and is decoupled from appearance, thereby preventing models from reproducing the unnatural look of synthetic videos. Building on this idea, DynaVid adopts a two-stage generation framework: a motion generator first synthesizes motion, and then a motion-guided video generator produces video frames conditioned on that motion. This decoupled formulation enables the model to learn dynamic motion patterns from synthetic data while preserving visual realism from real-world videos. We validate our framework on two challenging scenarios, vigorous human motion generation and extreme camera motion control, where existing datasets are particularly limited. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DynaVid improves the realism and controllability in dynamic motion generation and camera motion control.

AI.tldr: DynaVid：利用合成光流数据训练视频扩散模型，解决动态运动和精细运动控制问题
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在处理高度动态运动或需要精细运动控制时表现不佳，主要原因是训练数据中缺乏此类示例
AI.method: 提出DynaVid框架：1）使用计算机图形学渲染的合成光流数据作为训练数据；2）采用两阶段生成框架：运动生成器先合成运动（光流），然后运动引导的视频生成器基于运动生成视频帧
AI.result: 在剧烈人体运动生成和极端相机运动控制两个挑战性场景中，DynaVid显著提升了动态运动生成的真实性和可控性
AI.conclusion: 通过合成光流数据训练，DynaVid能够从合成数据学习动态运动模式，同时从真实世界视频保持视觉真实感，解决了现有数据集不足的问题

title: CompassAD: Intent-Driven 3D Affordance Grounding in Functionally Competing Objects
summary: When told to "cut the apple," a robot must choose the knife over nearby scissors, despite both objects affording the same cutting function. In real-world scenes, multiple objects may share identical affordances, yet only one is appropriate under the given task context. We call such cases confusing pairs. However, existing 3D affordance methods largely sidestep this challenge by evaluating isolated single objects, often with explicit category names provided in the query. We formalize Multi-Object Affordance Grounding under Intent-Driven Instructions, a new 3D affordance setting that requires predicting a per-point affordance mask on the correct object within a cluttered multi-object point cloud, conditioned on implicit natural language intent. To study this problem, we construct CompassAD, the first benchmark centered on implicit intent in confusable multi-object scenes. It comprises 30 confusing object pairs spanning 16 affordance types, 6,422 scenes, and 88K+ query-answer pairs. Furthermore, we propose CompassNet, a framework that incorporates two dedicated modules tailored to this task. Instance-bounded Cross Injection (ICI) constrains language-geometry alignment within object boundaries to prevent cross-object semantic leakage. Bi-level Contrastive Refinement (BCR) enforces discrimination at both geometric-group and point levels, sharpening distinctions between target and confusable surfaces. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art results on both seen and unseen queries, and deployment on a robotic manipulator confirms effective transfer to real-world grasping in confusing multi-object scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出Multi-Object Affordance Grounding新任务，构建CompassAD基准数据集，开发CompassNet框架解决多物体场景中基于隐式意图的混淆物体选择问题
AI.motivation: 现有3D affordance方法主要评估孤立单物体，且常依赖显式类别名称查询，无法处理真实场景中多个物体共享相同功能但只有特定物体适合给定任务上下文的情况（混淆对问题）
AI.method: 提出CompassNet框架：1) Instance-bounded Cross Injection (ICI)模块限制语言-几何对齐在物体边界内，防止跨物体语义泄漏；2) Bi-level Contrastive Refinement (BCR)模块在几何组和点级别强制执行区分，增强目标与混淆表面间的差异
AI.result: 在CompassAD基准上取得最先进结果，在可见和未见查询上均表现优异，在机器人操作器上的部署验证了在真实世界混淆多物体场景中有效抓取的迁移能力
AI.conclusion: 形式化了Multi-Object Affordance Grounding新任务，构建了首个关注隐式意图的混淆多物体场景基准CompassAD，提出的CompassNet框架通过ICI和BCR模块有效解决了混淆物体选择问题，展示了向真实机器人应用的可行性

title: MATA-Former & SIICU: Semantic Aware Temporal Alignment for High-Fidelity ICU Risk Prediction
summary: Forecasting evolving clinical risks relies on intrinsic pathological dependencies rather than mere chronological proximity, yet current methods struggle with coarse binary supervision and physical timestamps. To align predictive modeling with clinical logic, we propose the Medical-semantics Aware Time-ALiBi Transformer (MATA-Former), utilizing event semantics to dynamically parameterize attention weights to prioritize causal validity over time lags. Furthermore, we introduce Plateau-Gaussian Soft Labeling (PSL), reformulating binary classification into continuous multi-horizon regression for full-trajectory risk modeling. Evaluated on SIICU -- a newly constructed dataset featuring over 506k events with rigorous expert-verified, fine-grained annotations -- and the MIMIC-IV dataset, our framework demonstrates superior efficacy and robust generalization in capturing risks from text-intensive, irregular clinical time series.

AI.tldr: 提出MATA-Former模型，利用医学语义动态参数化注意力权重，结合PSL方法将二元分类转化为连续多时间范围回归，在临床风险预测中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前临床风险预测方法存在两个主要问题：1) 依赖粗糙的二元监督信号，无法捕捉风险演变的连续性；2) 过度依赖物理时间戳而非病理依赖关系。需要开发能更好对齐临床逻辑的预测模型。
AI.method: 提出MATA-Former（医学语义感知时间ALiBi Transformer），利用事件语义动态参数化注意力权重，优先考虑因果有效性而非时间间隔。同时提出PSL（Plateau-Gaussian软标签）方法，将二元分类重新表述为连续多时间范围回归，实现全轨迹风险建模。
AI.result: 在SIICU（新构建的数据集，包含50.6万+事件，具有专家验证的细粒度标注）和MIMIC-IV数据集上评估，该框架在捕捉文本密集型、不规则临床时间序列风险方面表现出优越效果和强大泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过将医学语义融入注意力机制和采用连续风险建模方法，MATA-Former能够更好地捕捉临床风险的演变规律，为临床决策提供更准确的预测支持。

title: DDCL: Deep Dual Competitive Learning: A Differentiable End-to-End Framework for Unsupervised Prototype-Based Representation Learning
summary: A persistent structural weakness in deep clustering is the disconnect between feature learning and cluster assignment. Most architectures invoke an external clustering step, typically k-means, to produce pseudo-labels that guide training, preventing the backbone from directly optimising for cluster quality. This paper introduces Deep Dual Competitive Learning (DDCL), the first fully differentiable end-to-end framework for unsupervised prototype-based representation learning. The core contribution is architectural: the external k-means is replaced by an internal Dual Competitive Layer (DCL) that generates prototypes as native differentiable outputs of the network. This single inversion makes the complete pipeline, from backbone feature extraction through prototype generation to soft cluster assignment, trainable by backpropagation through a single unified loss, with no Lloyd iterations, no pseudo-label discretisation, and no external clustering step. To ground the framework theoretically, the paper derives an exact algebraic decomposition of the soft quantisation loss into a simplex-constrained reconstruction error and a non-negative weighted prototype variance term. This identity reveals a self-regulating mechanism built into the loss geometry: the gradient of the variance term acts as an implicit separation force that resists prototype collapse without any auxiliary objective, and leads to a global Lyapunov stability theorem for the reduced frozen-encoder system. Six blocks of controlled experiments validate each structural prediction. The decomposition identity holds with zero violations across more than one hundred thousand training epochs; the negative feedback cycle is confirmed with Pearson -0.98; with a jointly trained backbone, DDCL outperforms its non-differentiable ablation by 65% in clustering accuracy and DeepCluster end-to-end by 122%.

AI.tldr: DDCL提出首个完全可微的端到端无监督原型表示学习框架，用内部双竞争层替代外部k-means，实现从特征提取到聚类分配的完整可微训练。
AI.motivation: 深度聚类中存在特征学习与聚类分配的结构性脱节问题，大多数方法依赖外部聚类步骤（如k-means）生成伪标签，阻碍了网络直接优化聚类质量。
AI.method: 引入双竞争层（DCL）作为网络原生可微输出生成原型，通过单一统一损失实现从特征提取到软聚类分配的端到端反向传播训练，无需外部聚类步骤。
AI.result: 理论推导显示软量化损失可分解为单纯形约束重构误差和非负加权原型方差项，实验验证分解恒等式零违反，负反馈循环Pearson相关系数-0.98，聚类准确率比不可微消融提升65%，比DeepCluster提升122%。
AI.conclusion: DDCL通过架构创新解决了深度聚类中特征学习与聚类分配的脱节问题，实现了完全可微的端到端训练，理论分析揭示了损失几何中的自调节机制，实验验证了其优越性能。

title: Not All Tokens See Equally: Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: While Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has advanced reasoning in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), prevailing frameworks suffer from a foundational methodological flaw: by distributing identical advantages across all generated tokens, these methods inherently dilute the learning signals essential for optimizing the critical, visually-grounded steps of multimodal reasoning. To bridge this gap, we formulate \textit{Token Visual Dependency}, quantifying the causal information gain of visual inputs via the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between visual-conditioned and text-only predictive distributions. Revealing that this dependency is highly sparse and semantically pivotal, we introduce Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization (PGPO), which is a novel fine-grained credit assignment framework that dynamically reshapes advantages at the token level. Through a threshold-gated, mass-conserving mechanism, PGPO actively amplifies learning signals for visually-dependent tokens while suppressing gradient noise from linguistic priors. Extensive experiments based on the Qwen2.5-VL series across seven challenging multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that PGPO boosts models by 18.7% on average. Both theoretical and empirical analyses confirm that PGPO effectively reduces gradient variance, prevents training collapse, and acts as a potent regularizer for robust, perception-grounded multimodal reasoning. Code will be published on https://github.com/Yzk1114/PGPO.

AI.tldr: PGPO提出了一种细粒度的信用分配框架，通过量化视觉依赖并动态调整token级优势，解决了多模态推理中视觉信号被稀释的问题，显著提升了模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习框架存在方法缺陷：将所有生成token分配相同优势值，稀释了多模态推理中关键视觉步骤的学习信号，导致视觉依赖的token得不到有效优化。
AI.method: 提出Token Visual Dependency概念，通过KL散度量化视觉输入的信息增益；设计Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization框架，使用阈值门控的质量守恒机制动态重塑token级优势，放大视觉依赖token的学习信号，抑制语言先验的梯度噪声。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL系列模型和7个挑战性多模态推理基准上的实验表明，PGPO平均提升模型性能18.7%，有效降低梯度方差，防止训练崩溃，并作为强大的正则化器。
AI.conclusion: PGPO通过细粒度的token级信用分配，解决了多模态强化学习中视觉信号稀释问题，实现了更稳健、感知基础的多模态推理，为视觉语言模型的强化学习训练提供了新范式。

title: Reliable Control-Point Selection for Steering Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Steering vectors offer a training-free mechanism for controlling reasoning behaviors in large language models, but constructing effective vectors requires identifying genuine behavioral signals in the model's hidden states. For behaviors that can be toggled via prompts, this is straightforward. However, many reasoning behaviors -- such as self-reflection -- emerge spontaneously and resist prompt-level control. Current methods detect these behaviors through keyword matching in chain-of-thought traces, implicitly assuming that every detected boundary encodes a genuine behavioral signal. We show that this assumption is overwhelmingly wrong: across 541 keyword-detected boundaries, 93.3\% are behaviorally unstable, failing to reproduce the detected behavior under re-generation from the same prefix. We develop a probabilistic model that formalizes intrinsic reasoning behaviors as stochastic events with context-dependent trigger probabilities, and show that unstable boundaries dilute the steering signal. Guided by this analysis, we propose stability filtering, which retains only boundaries where the model consistently reproduces the target behavior. Combined with a content-subspace projection that removes residual question-specific noise, our method achieves 0.784 accuracy on MATH-500 (+5.0 over the strongest baseline). The resulting steering vectors transfer across models in the same architecture family without re-extraction, improving Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-1.5B (+5.0) and DeepScaleR-1.5B-Preview (+6.0). Code is available at https://github.com/zhmzm/stability-steering.

AI.tldr: 论文提出稳定性过滤方法，通过筛选行为稳定的边界来改进推理行为的转向向量构建，显著提升数学推理性能
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过关键词匹配检测推理行为边界，但大多数边界行为不稳定，无法在相同前缀下重现，这稀释了转向信号的有效性
AI.method: 提出稳定性过滤方法，只保留模型能一致重现目标行为的边界；结合内容子空间投影去除问题特定噪声；构建概率模型形式化推理行为
AI.result: 在MATH-500上达到0.784准确率（比最强基线提升5.0%）；转向向量可在同架构模型间迁移，提升Nemotron-Research-Reasoning-1.5B（+5.0）和DeepScaleR-1.5B-Preview（+6.0）性能
AI.conclusion: 稳定性过滤能有效识别真正的行为信号，构建更鲁棒的转向向量，显著提升推理性能并支持跨模型迁移

title: Unifying UAV Cross-View Geo-Localization via 3D Geometric Perception
summary: Cross-view geo-localization for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) operating in GNSS-denied environments remains challenging due to the severe geometric discrepancy between oblique UAV imagery and orthogonal satellite maps. Most existing methods address this problem through a decoupled pipeline of place retrieval and pose estimation, implicitly treating perspective distortion as appearance noise rather than an explicit geometric transformation. In this work, we propose a geometry-aware UAV geo-localization framework that explicitly models the 3D scene geometry to unify coarse place recognition and fine-grained pose estimation within a single inference pipeline. Our approach reconstructs a local 3D scene from multi-view UAV image sequences using a Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT), and renders a virtual Bird's-Eye View (BEV) representation that orthorectifies the UAV perspective to align with satellite imagery. This BEV serves as a geometric intermediary that enables robust cross-view retrieval and provides spatial priors for accurate 3 Degrees of Freedom (3-DoF) pose regression. To efficiently handle multiple location hypotheses, we introduce a Satellite-wise Attention Block that isolates the interaction between each satellite candidate and the reconstructed UAV scene, preventing inter-candidate interference while maintaining linear computational complexity. In addition, we release a recalibrated version of the University-1652 dataset with precise coordinate annotations and spatial overlap analysis, enabling rigorous evaluation of end-to-end localization accuracy. Extensive experiments on the refined University-1652 benchmark and SUES-200 demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving robust meter-level localization accuracy and improved generalization in complex urban environments.

AI.tldr: 提出几何感知的无人机地理定位框架，通过3D场景重建和虚拟鸟瞰图渲染统一粗粒度位置识别与细粒度姿态估计，在GNSS拒止环境中实现米级定位精度。
AI.motivation: 解决无人机在GNSS拒止环境中的跨视角地理定位挑战，特别是斜视无人机图像与正交卫星地图之间的严重几何差异问题。现有方法将透视畸变视为外观噪声而非显式几何变换，采用解耦的检索-姿态估计流程存在局限。
AI.method: 提出几何感知框架：1) 使用视觉几何基础Transformer从多视角无人机图像序列重建局部3D场景；2) 渲染虚拟鸟瞰图表示，将无人机视角正交校正以对齐卫星图像；3) 引入卫星注意力块隔离每个候选位置与重建场景的交互，避免候选间干扰；4) 发布重新校准的University-1652数据集，包含精确坐标标注和空间重叠分析。
AI.result: 在重新校准的University-1652基准和SUES-200数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法显著优于现有最先进基线，实现鲁棒的米级定位精度，在复杂城市环境中具有更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模3D场景几何，将粗粒度位置识别和细粒度姿态估计统一到单个推理流程中，解决了跨视角地理定位中的几何差异问题，为GNSS拒止环境中的无人机定位提供了有效解决方案。

title: Qiana: A First-Order Formalism to Quantify over Contexts and Formulas with Temporality
summary: We introduce Qiana, a logic framework for reasoning on formulas that are true only in specific contexts. In Qiana, it is possible to quantify over both formulas and contexts to express, e.g., that ``everyone knows everything Alice says''. Qiana also permits paraconsistent logics within contexts, so that contexts can contain contradictions. Furthermore, Qiana is based on first-order logic, and is finitely axiomatizable, so that Qiana theories are compatible with pre-existing first-order logic theorem provers. We show how Qiana can be used to represent temporality, event calculus, and modal logic. We also discuss different design alternatives of Qiana.

AI.tldr: Qiana是一个用于在特定上下文中进行推理的逻辑框架，支持对公式和上下文进行量化，允许上下文包含矛盾，基于一阶逻辑且可有限公理化。
AI.motivation: 需要一种能够在特定上下文中进行推理的逻辑框架，能够表达复杂的知识关系（如"每个人都知道Alice说的一切"），同时支持上下文内的矛盾（paraconsistent逻辑），并与现有的一阶逻辑定理证明器兼容。
AI.method: 基于一阶逻辑构建Qiana框架，使其可有限公理化，支持对公式和上下文的量化，允许在上下文中使用paraconsistent逻辑处理矛盾，并设计不同的框架变体。
AI.result: 展示了Qiana能够表示时间性、事件演算和模态逻辑，证明了其表达能力，并讨论了不同的设计替代方案。
AI.conclusion: Qiana是一个强大而灵活的逻辑框架，能够在特定上下文中进行推理，支持复杂的量化表达和矛盾处理，并与现有的一阶逻辑工具兼容，具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Learn by Surprise, Commit by Proof
summary: We propose LSCP, a self-gated post-training framework for autonomous knowledge acquisition: learning only what a model does not already know, verified against what it does know, at a strength proportional to conviction, with no external oracle. When a passage produces anomalously high per-token loss, LSCP flags it, generates a Q&A chain that forces the model to articulate its own knowledge and identify gaps, then adjusts AdamW's $β_2$ proportionally to conviction depth k (the number of self-verification steps the passage survives) via $β_2 = 0.999 \cdot r^k$. The entire learning intensity is governed by a single parameter $r$. Beyond new knowledge, this process sharpens weakly encoded existing knowledge, which is a primary source of hallucination. The framework is self-extinguishing: as the model learns, per-token loss on learned passages decreases toward the surprisal threshold and the system progressively converges to standard AdamW. This models biological memory consolidation: temporary information in the context window is selectively consolidated into parametric weights, the model's long-term memory. Experiments on the reference model (Qwen3-14B) and across six models (8B--32B, four families) show that standard fine-tuning produces rote memorization (perturbation gap (the ratio of paraphrase to original perplexity) of 11.6 +- 0.2 x baseline) while all LSCP conditions learn semantically (2.7--3.0x). The r=1.0 condition (identical optimizer, nearly identical data, only Q&A format differs) confirms that the training data format, not $β_2$ gating, is the primary mechanism preventing memorization; gating instead protects neighboring knowledge from contamination by corrupt content (93 +- 7% accuracy on adjacent questions at r=0.98 vs. 90% baseline).

AI.tldr: LSCP是一个自门控后训练框架，通过检测异常高损失段落、生成问答链让模型自我验证知识缺口，并基于验证深度自适应调整AdamW的β₂参数，实现自主知识获取和记忆巩固。
AI.motivation: 现有模型容易产生幻觉，主要源于弱编码的现有知识。需要一种方法让模型自主识别知识缺口，避免外部监督，同时防止相邻知识被污染。
AI.method: 1) 检测异常高损失段落；2) 生成问答链让模型自我验证知识缺口；3) 基于验证深度k调整AdamW的β₂参数：β₂ = 0.999·r^k；4) 整个学习强度由单个参数r控制。
AI.result: 标准微调产生死记硬背（扰动间隙11.6±0.2倍基线），而所有LSCP条件学习语义（2.7-3.0倍）。r=1.0条件证明训练数据格式（而非β₂门控）是防止记忆的主要机制；门控保护相邻知识免受污染（r=0.98时相邻问题准确率93±7% vs 90%基线）。
AI.conclusion: LSCP框架实现了自主知识获取，模拟生物记忆巩固过程，将上下文中的临时信息选择性地巩固到参数权重中。该框架自熄灭，随着模型学习逐渐收敛到标准AdamW。

title: Ouroboros: Dynamic Weight Generation for Recursive Transformers via Input-Conditioned LoRA Modulation
comment: 10 pages, 5 tables, 1 figure, 1 algorithm. Code: https://github.com/RightNow-AI/ouroboros
summary: Recursive transformers reuse a shared weight block across multiple depth steps, trading parameters for compute. A core limitation: every step applies the same transformation, preventing the model from composing distinct operations across depth. We present Ouroboros, a system that attaches a compact Controller hypernetwork to a recursive transformer block. The Controller observes the current hidden state, produces a per-step diagonal modulation vector, and applies it to frozen SVD-initialized LoRA bases, making each recurrence step input-dependent. We combine this with gated recurrence (bias-initialized to 88% retention) and per-step LayerNorm for stable deep iteration. On Qwen2.5-3B split into a Prelude/Recurrent/Coda architecture (17 of 36 layers retained), Ouroboros reduces training loss by 43.4% over the unmodified 17-layer baseline, recovering 51.3% of the performance gap caused by layer removal. The full system adds only 9.2M trainable parameters (Controller, gate, and per-step norms) yet outperforms equivalently-sized static per-step LoRA by 1.44 loss points at depth 1 and remains ahead across all tested depths (1, 4, 8, 16) and ranks (8, 32, 64). We also find that gated recurrence is essential: without it, recursive layer application makes the model strictly worse. These gains are measured on the training distribution; on held-out text, the Controller does not yet improve over the baseline, a limitation we attribute to frozen downstream layers and discuss in detail. Code: https://github.com/RightNow-AI/ouroboros

AI.tldr: Ouroboros 提出了一种带控制器的递归Transformer系统，通过超网络生成输入相关的调制向量，使递归块在不同深度执行不同操作，显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统递归Transformer在多个深度步骤中重用相同的权重块，导致每个步骤应用相同的变换，无法在不同深度组合不同的操作，限制了模型的表达能力。
AI.method: 1. 将Controller超网络附加到递归Transformer块；2. Controller观察当前隐藏状态，生成每步对角调制向量；3. 将调制应用于冻结的SVD初始化LoRA基；4. 结合门控递归（偏置初始化为88%保留率）和每步LayerNorm实现稳定深度迭代。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-3B的17层架构上，Ouroboros相比未修改的17层基线减少43.4%训练损失，恢复了51.3%因层移除导致的性能差距。仅增加9.2M可训练参数，在所有测试深度和秩上都优于同等大小的静态每步LoRA。门控递归是必要的，没有它递归层应用会使模型变差。
AI.conclusion: Ouroboros通过输入相关的递归变换显著提升了递归Transformer的性能，但改进目前仅限于训练分布，在未见文本上尚未超越基线，这归因于冻结的下游层，是需要进一步研究的方向。

title: Novel Memory Forgetting Techniques for Autonomous AI Agents: Balancing Relevance and Efficiency
summary: Long-horizon conversational agents require persistent memory for coherent reasoning, yet uncontrolled accumulation causes temporal decay and false memory propagation. Benchmarks such as LOCOMO and LOCCO report performance degradation from 0.455 to 0.05 across stages, while MultiWOZ shows 78.2% accuracy with 6.8% false memory rate under persistent retention. This work introduces an adaptive budgeted forgetting framework that regulates memory through relevanceguided scoring and bounded optimization. The approach integrates recency, frequency, and semantic alignment to maintain stability under constrained context. Comparative analysis demonstrates improved long-horizon F1 beyond 0.583 baseline levels, higher retention consistency, and reduced false memory behavior without increasing context usage. These findings confirm that structured forgetting preserves reasoning performance while preventing unbounded memory growth in extended conversational settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应预算遗忘框架，通过相关性引导评分和有界优化来调节记忆，解决长对话中记忆积累导致的性能衰减和错误记忆传播问题。
AI.motivation: 长对话智能体需要持久记忆进行连贯推理，但不受控制的记忆积累会导致时间衰减和错误记忆传播。现有基准测试显示性能显著下降，如LOCOMO和LOCCO中性能从0.455降至0.05，MultiWOZ中准确率为78.2%但错误记忆率达6.8%。
AI.method: 提出自适应预算遗忘框架，通过相关性引导评分和有界优化来调节记忆。该方法整合了时效性、频率和语义对齐，在受限上下文中保持稳定性。
AI.result: 该方法在长对话F1分数上超过0.583的基线水平，提高了记忆保持一致性，减少了错误记忆行为，且未增加上下文使用量。
AI.conclusion: 结构化遗忘在保持推理性能的同时，防止了扩展对话场景中无界记忆增长，证实了该方法在长对话记忆管理中的有效性。

title: EventHub: Data Factory for Generalizable Event-Based Stereo Networks without Active Sensors
comment: CVPR 2026. Project Page: https://bartn8.github.io/eventhub/ Code: https://github.com/bartn8/eventhub
summary: We propose EventHub, a novel framework for training deep-event stereo networks without ground truth annotations from costly active sensors, relying instead on standard color images. From these images, we derive either proxy annotations and proxy events through state-of-the-art novel view synthesis techniques, or simply proxy annotations when images are already paired with event data. Using the training set generated by our data factory, we repurpose state-of-the-art stereo models from RGB literature to process event data, obtaining new event stereo models with unprecedented generalization capabilities. Experiments on widely used event stereo datasets support the effectiveness of EventHub and show how the same data distillation mechanism can improve the accuracy of RGB stereo foundation models in challenging conditions such as nighttime scenes.

AI.tldr: EventHub是一个无需地面真实标注的事件立体视觉训练框架，利用标准彩色图像生成代理标注和代理事件，将RGB立体模型迁移到事件数据，实现前所未有的泛化能力
AI.motivation: 传统事件立体视觉网络需要来自昂贵主动传感器的地面真实标注，成本高昂。本文旨在开发无需地面真实标注的深度事件立体网络训练方法
AI.method: 提出EventHub框架：1）从标准彩色图像通过最先进的新视角合成技术生成代理标注和代理事件；2）当图像已与事件数据配对时仅生成代理标注；3）利用生成的数据集重新利用RGB立体模型处理事件数据
AI.result: 在广泛使用的事件立体数据集上的实验支持EventHub的有效性，展示了前所未有的泛化能力。相同的数据蒸馏机制还能提高RGB立体基础模型在夜间场景等挑战性条件下的准确性
AI.conclusion: EventHub为事件立体视觉提供了一种无需地面真实标注的有效训练框架，成功将RGB立体模型迁移到事件数据，并展示了在挑战性条件下的性能提升
